positive: Stylized minimalist illustration of a celestial guardian owl perched on a stylized crescent moon. The owl has an ethereal, majestic silhouette with feather details depicted using clean geometric linework. The moon should be glowing with soft pastel gradients (lavender, pale gold). Incorporate flowing cosmic dust trails and subtle nebula patterns surrounding the owl and moon. Use a limited, harmonious color palette: deep indigo, pastel lavender, matte gold, and cream. High contrast black line art overlaying soft, abstract gradient washes. Suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Vector art style, clean outlines, central composition, symmetrical balance, intricate details, graphic design.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, logos, signature, gradient banding, jpeg compression, noise, rough edges, photorealism, poor anatomy, asymmetrical, crowded, low resolution
